title: Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion

{{Quote|The Wookiees continue to resist our overtures. Now they will learn the price of their insolence. Take a legion to Kashyyyk and destroy the trade settlement.|Darth Sidious|<ref name="SWB" />}}
The '''Kashyyyk Trade Rebellion''' took place sometime during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], when a variety of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and corporations began to withdraw from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The battle occurred when the [[Wookiee Trade Guild]], which controlled a large amount of commerce in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]], attempted to resist a new taxation imposed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. As a result, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], an ally of the Federation, ordered a legion of the Federation's [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|droid army]], including the newly unveiled [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], to destroy the Wookiee Trade Guild. The [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] army, led by Sidious's [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], attacked the Trade Guild's [[Kashyyyk Islands|island headquarters]] in the [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The Trade Guild's private [[Army of the Wookiee Trade Guild|army]] tried to defend the island, but the entire village was eventually destroyed by the Federation's forces.

==Prelude==
Sometime during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] where several [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and corporations began seceding from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]—one of the corporations about to leave the Republic<ref name="NEC" />—attempted to impose several new excises on the [[Wookiee Trade Guild]]. The Trade Guild, which controlled a large amount of commerce in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]], tried to oppose these new taxes, much to the displeasure of the Trade Federation.<ref name="SWB" />

[[File:Kashyyyk_village_BF1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[Wookiee Trade Guild]] settlement.]]
As a result, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] and ally of the Federation, ordered a two-hundred strong legion of the Federation's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|army]] to be dispatched to the Trade Guild's headquarters on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Under the command of Sidious's new [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the droid legion consisted of [[assault battle droid]]s, [[battle droid assassin]]s, [[Pilot droid/Legends|pilot droids]], [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]], and the new [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. The legion was tasked with completely destroying the Guild's small island base in Kashyyyk's [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]].<ref name="SWB" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|The Wookiees continue to resist our overtures. Now, they will learn the price of their insolence. Take a legion to Kashyyyk and destroy the trade settlement|Darth Sidious to the player before the mission|<ref name="SWB" />}}
When the Federation legion landed on the island, they immediately began to assault the Guild's headquarters, with Dooku leading the assault. Two-hundred members of the Guild's private [[Army of the Wookiee Trade Guild|army]] of Wookiees, armed with [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]] and [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]], tried to defend the village from the assault. However, the Federation forces flanked the village from the hills on the northeast and northwest sides of the island, as well as from a small landing site on the south side. The droid army also utilized at least two [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]] to strafe the village, and eventually the Guild's army was overwhelmed and the entire village was destroyed by Dooku and his forces.<ref name="SWB" />

==Aftermath==
The Federation left very few Guild members to survive the battle, effectively destroying the Wookiee Trade Guild.<ref name="SWB" /> Years after the battle, the Federation and several other allies formed the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], led by Count Dooku, which officially seceded from the Republic, resulting in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the two factions.<ref name="NEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle made its first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'', where it made up the third level in the games historical Clone Wars campaign, despite the fact that the battle does not take place during the Clone Wars. In the level, the player fights in the Federation army and helps destroy the Wookiee Trade Guild.
